findings.detail: CONFIRMED: shadow_votes is GONE from the entire file. (1) run_post_gate1() signature: (config, state, mock=False, verbose=False, gate1_decision=None) — no shadow_votes parameter. (2) generate_decision() call at line 239: no shadow_votes keyword argument. (3) grep verified: zero occurrences of 'shadow_votes' in file. The hardcoded None has been completely removed rather than just set to None.

Archive helper _archive() wraps archivist.save_json() in try/except — never crashes pipeline. Archive filenames are hardcoded strings (e.g., '03_layer1_narrative', '04_layer2_fundamental') — no path traversal. Raw analysis truncated to 2000 chars before archiving.

No API keys, secrets, or credentials in this module. All LLM calls delegated to separately audited pipeline modules (layer1, layer2, layer3, red_team, resonance, decision). Gateway initialized upstream in pre_gate1.

mother.orchestrate_daily_cycle() called only when config.shadow.shadows_enabled=True AND mother is not None (line 125-131). Phase F crystallization gated behind config.shadow.crystallization_enabled. Safe None-guards prevent dereference errors.

Phase H enhancements (regime_mapper, scenario_forecaster, fragility_scanner, cross_border_analyzer) each wrapped in try/except with logger.warning. Pipeline continues on failure — these are enhancements, not critical path.
archivist.index_document() at Stage 10: content constructed from pipeline outputs (event_grade, macro_quadrant, resonance.verdict) — no user-controlled strings.

notes: DEFINITIVE AUDIT for shadow_votes removal. Parameter is GONE from signature and generate_decision() call — no trace remaining. Module is clean: no credentials exposed, safe archive paths with validated config directory, Phase H modules wrapped in error recovery, shadow ecosystem properly gated.
